name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-4
title: workflow-rules.md R6: update injection mechanism description
description: R6 currently describes the old discipline-only injection mechanism ('Dispatcher discipline + PR review, no Agent-tool hook in Claude Code'). Must be updated to reflect the new architecture: primary injection = CLAUDE.md inline policy (generated by generate-claude-md.sh, loaded by Claude Code for every session including subagents); redundant second layer = explicit policy block in dispatch prompts; enforcement = generate-claude-md.sh + rbt-sync-check.sh Stop hook + E2E subagent recall test. Requires a policy feature touch.

history.note: Closing: fix already implemented in commit e70ba48.
Fixed in commit e70ba48: workflow-rules.md R6 updated to 3-layer injection architecture.
